title: An Act to Protect Patients from Health Care Discrimination and Guarantee Access to the Lowest Available Cost for Care
committee: Health Coverage, Insurance and Financial Services
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 28, 2025
last_house_action: 4/8/2025 - Committee on HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES suggested and ordered printed. On motion of Representative MEYER of Eliot, the Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/28/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
